message:
test(engine): add test enrichment batch 3 to bulkhead and global coherence checker

Concurrent agent test additions:
- bulkhead.rs (+211): clone equality, JSON field presence, edge cases,
  drain behavior, pressure threshold boundaries
- global_coherence_checker.rs (+466): CompositionEdgeKind display for
  remaining variants, composition graph edge cases, checker configuration
  sensitivity, violation report formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
